responses.text: Japan has one of the highest suicide rates in the world, with 18.5 suicides per 100,000 people
Unemployment rose within nine months of the official start of the pandemic in Japan.
The number of suicides in Japan reached 21,077 in 2020, the first increase in 11 years, and even 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
Japan's suicide rate fell 20% in April compared to the same period last year
The COVID-19 pandemic has a significant effect on mental health, which could lead to a rise in suicide rates.
Suicide rates increased by 37% among women and by 49% among children and adolescents
The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the frequency of people feeling lonely in Japan.
Donald Trump secured the promise of the leaders of both Israel and the Palestinians to work to resolve the conflict
Palestinian leaders denounced the agreement on the normalization of relations between the United Arab Emirates and Israel.

Mahmoud Abbas said at a meeting of Fatah Central Committee in Ramallah that if Israel annexes even one centimeter of the Abrahamic Shrine in Hebron or Al-Aqwar or settlements, Palestine will cancel all agreements with Israel and the United States.
Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas called for an extraordinary meeting of the Arab League as well as an urgent meeting of Palestinian leaders and groups to discuss the consequences of the agreement.

The Foreign Ministry of the Palestinian Authority also condemned the aggressive attack by the Zionist army on the leaders of the Islamic Jihad in Damascus and Gaza and called on the international community and the United Nations to act to stop the crimes of the regime.
Hamas leader Ismail Rezvan said the message of the Iranian leader showed strategic support for the Palestinian people.

Palestinian Authority leaders announced they would stop cooperating in the process of recognizing Israel’s existence in exchange for an independent Palestinian state, including security and economic issues
37.5% of foreign patients go to cosmetic surgery and dermatology hospitals
Statistics of cosmetic surgery have been growing not only in Iran, but also in many countries of the world.
Cosmetic surgery is performed with unsanitary conditions in some places.
A 21-year-old Jiangsu woman spent more than 100,000 yuan to perform breast augmentation, nose augmentation and M lip surgery at a cosmetic hospital in Changzhou, but died on the operating table.
Men are also sometimes candidates for cosmetic surgeries for various reasons
The entrance and exit routes of the Xindian District Qiaoren Park game venues in Xindian District of New Taipei City are barrier-free and friendly, and enjoy sufficient rest and leisure space.

New Taipei Civil Affairs Minister Ke Ching-chung said that in traditional urban areas with high population densities such as Xinbei Banqiao, Xinzhuang, Wugu, and Sanchong, most park facilities have reached the end of use.
Turkish series has many fans among Arab audiences.

Turkey continues to implement the strategy of expanding military, political, economic and cultural influence in countries that can conditionally be included in the project of the so-called “Great Turan ”.
The atmosphere of Mars contains only 0.13% oxygen, compared to 21% on Earth.
Perseverance has an experimental installation MOXIE to receive oxygen from carbon dioxide in the atmosphere of Mars.
Bayer has settled 88,500 of 125,000 claims.
Monsanto has been sued in the United States for suspected cancer caused by the herbicide Roundup, and Bayer is seeking to settle the lawsuit with $11 billion in damages.
The picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, considered stolen since 1997, was found by workers in the wall of the gallery of modern art Ricci Oddi in Piacenza.

Italian authorities on Friday confirmed the authenticity of a painting by Gustav Klimt, a famous Austrian artist, that was stolen in 1997 and was recently discovered in the same Italian gallery where it was stolen.
The content of carbon dioxide in the Earth's atmosphere has reached a record level
Agriculture is quite susceptible to climate change.
The award of the Berlin Film Festival is proud for the Iranian filmmaker
The Golden Bear for Best Film of the 70th Berlinale goes to "Sheytan vojud nadarad" (There Is No Evil), directed by Mohammad Rasoulof.
Britain and France agree to stop asylum seekers crossing the English Channel
235 illegal migrants in 17 boats attempting to cross the English Channel from northern France were intercepted by British Coast Guard and Border Guard officers on Thursday.
The test of the Stratolaunch aircraft passed successfully
The Stratolaunch aircraft is the largest in the world
There was a massive collision on the famous cycling race "Tour de France".
A fan with a banner provoked a mass blockage at the Tour de France
Crew Dragon is expected to fly to the International Space Station
NASA astronauts Douglas Hurley and Robert Benken went to the International Space Station (ISS) on board Crew Dragon.
Iran does not recognize the decisions of the Canadian court in the case of the downed Ukrainian plane
Iran shot down the Ukrainian plane with flight number PS-752 on January 8, 2019, using at least two IRGC defense missiles, resulting in the death of all 176 people on board.
Russia's embassy in North Korea announced that North Korea had detained a Russian fishing boat and detained 15 Russian and two South Korean crew members on board for illegal entry.
The Russian embassy in Pyongyang said there were 17 crew members on board the detained vessel, of whom 15 were Russian citizens and two were South Koreans.
The International Whaling Commission has banned commercial whaling since 1986 due to some whale species being endangered.
Japan is withdrawing from the International Whaling Commission (IWC) in 2019 to resume commercial whaling
The article references Ernest Miller, Hemingway.
China has contributed to the International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) project in southern France.
An international experimental thermonuclear reactor ITER is being built in France
